title: North America Clean Fuels Market Monthly Review: December 2025
content:
Key Highlights:

BC LCFS monthly trading volumes rose from 80.55K credits in October to 140.00K credits in November. In November, BC LCFS credit prices rose by 3.80% MoM. In November, OR CFP average credit prices decreased by 19.44% compared to October. OR CFP trading activity witnessed a 56.64% fall in November. CA LCFS average monthly credit price fell by 1.31% month-over-month (MoM) in December. Monthly credit transactions rose by 28.61% MoM in December. Canada CFR bid and offer prices for both CC2 & CC3 fell MoM in December. Both average CC3 and CC2 offer price fell by 1.94%. CC2 and CC3 average bid prices stand at 355.66 CAD & average offer prices stand at 371.97 CAD in December. Average credit prices in WA CFS fell by 5.45% MoM in November. In November, 89.33K credits were traded with a total transaction value of $2.43M. RIN generation decreased by 14.83% MoM in November. 8.12B RINs were transacted in November, recording a 18.31% MoM decrease.
author: Radhika Khandelwal
